name: 40s & 50s Classics
author: Beatify Community
description: 152 classics from the 1940s and 1950s — rock'n'roll, doo-wop, early pop and jazz standards. Elvis Presley, Chuck Berry, Buddy Holly, Little Richard, Fats Domino, Frank Sinatra, Billie Holiday and more. Spanning 1939-1962. Fills Beatify's pre-60s decade gap (#922).
